title: Episode 6 Japanese to English text translations
display_title: Episode 6 Japanese to English text translations
wikitext:
[]: Episode 6 Japanese to English text translations?             Quote Post by Kraider » Wed Jan 15, 2014 9:10 pm On episode 6 there is Japanese text at the bottom of the screen. On a subbed episode the "balloon dummy" one was translated, then more come up while they were talking, and on the translated or even subtitled versions, fan made or not, none that I have found display an English translation. I have switched to a subtitled version on an earlier episode with a Japanese text to Shinji while in class just so I know what the heck it said, I don't seem to have any luck for this though, and I have searched extensively. The subtitled versions are fairly close to the vocal translation though, mostly word-for-word and when it's not it's often a minor word change that affects nothing, so I see no problems with the "dub" other than Japanese text not always being translated. I do want to know what it says at the bottom of the screen while the Nerv commander and other people are in the control/monitoring room while they're talking about the AT field of the angel, starting at around the 4 minute mark of the episode. Can someone link to some resource that has a translation for this text, please? If I continue watching the series now I might never know what it says and I'd like to know before I watch anymore episodes (even though some of it's already been spoiled for me... I don't know if this is the right board for this question or not by the way, sorry if it's not.)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 15, 2014 9:14 pm Is the translation in the FGC? https://wiki.evageeks.org/FGC:Episode_06_Scene_02

[]:             Quote Post by Kraider » Wed Jan 15, 2014 9:52 pm Ornette wrote: Is the translation in the FGC? https://wiki.evageeks.org/FGC:Episode_06_Scene_02

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 15, 2014 11:01 pm That's because my link was "https", which uses a self signed certificate. You can just change it to "http".

[]:             Quote Post by Kraider » Wed Jan 15, 2014 11:21 pm Ornette wrote: That's because my link was "https", which uses a self signed certificate. You can just change it to "http".

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 16, 2014 2:15 am The captions were overtitled on the ADV DVDs; not sure why that one isn't listed on the commentary. It starts with NERV, so will be something to the effect of "NERV operations centre".

[]:             Quote Post by Kraider » Thu Jan 16, 2014 3:13 am Mr. Tines wrote: The captions were overtitled on the ADV DVDs; not sure why that one isn't listed on the commentary. It starts with NERV, so will be something to the effect of "NERV operations centre".

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jan 16, 2014 7:17 am Is this it? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Kraider » Thu Jan 16, 2014 3:20 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Is this it? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 16, 2014 4:43 pm Can a scribe add this to the commentary for the relevant cut (like the other captions)?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 16, 2014 5:29 pm Only special FGC editors can change those cuts. https://wiki.evageeks.org/FGC:Episode_06_Cut_065

[]:             Quote Post by Kraider » Mon Jan 20, 2014 3:53 pm Okay, first real issue with the dub: The title for episode 17 is Fourth Children. Not Fourth Child, or Four Children; Fourth Children. What's the deal with that?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 21, 2014 6:32 pm It's not the dub, that is literally what the original script calls them, in English: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Children

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jan 21, 2014 6:44 pm However, there is no benefit in meaning to using the weird translation "children" instead of simply "child". You may prefer a rather specious "authenticity", but arguing that it actually matters in any way is simply a waste of time.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Tue Jan 21, 2014 7:07 pm And Rebuild dropped the Children thing entirely, saying "xth Boy/Girl" in Japanese instead.

[]:             Quote Post by Kraider » Tue Jan 21, 2014 10:34 pm pwhodges wrote: However, there is no benefit in meaning to using the weird translation "children" instead of simply "child". You may prefer a rather specious "authenticity", but arguing that it actually matters in any way is simply a waste of time.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Tue Jan 21, 2014 11:03 pm Kraider wrote: Okay. In looking through some other threads, there seems to be a lot of hate on the dub. What's wrong with it then? I have seen some episodes side by side and there was literally no difference in the English dialogue and subtitles in most scenes, minus a synonym here and there. What is the hate about? Also, I'm thinking of dropping the "episode 6" in this thread's title and all translation questions/answers/comments can go here? It would just be redundant to make a new one otherwise and clog up the front page of the board.

[]:             Quote Post by Kraider » Wed Jan 22, 2014 1:21 am Verbatim quote of entire previous post removed Localization? Oh, you mean like all the Japanese text on the screen that comes up?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jan 22, 2014 1:24 am I mean the process of making a text relatable and understandable for a foreign audience. e: Damn it autocorrect.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 22, 2014 1:56 am Since we have this thread -- http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/521/What-do-you-watch-with-Dub-or-Sub/ -- for this sort of discussion; and the original question has been answered (and the commentary updated accordingly), we're probably done here, actually.
